subcodes.first_line: O God! O Thou Who rendeth asunder every veil, revealeth every mystery, guideth the righteous, and shineth effulgent light upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا هاتک الاستار و کاشف الاسرار و هادی الابرار و الفائض بالانوار علی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
